allow: Bash(sed -i 's/- Bottom-row mod-taps with Chordal Hold \(positions 26-28 left, 31-33 right\)/- Bottom-row mod-taps with Chordal Hold \(positions 26-28 left, 31-33 right\)\\n- FAVS left home row: Esc, QK_LLCK, MO\(NAV_DEL\) delete-hold, MM_GUICTRL, SEL_LATCH, SW_WIN \(since June 2026\)/' MEMORY.md)
Bash(sed -i '/FAVS home row positions 13-15 are KC_TRNS/d' MEMORY.md)
Bash(sed -i '/Callum-style oneshot shift \(OS_SHFT\) still active/d' MEMORY.md)
